text_original: okay not great, get rid of your censorship, it's not fantasy if you censor everything, i feel like I want my money back.This was not worth the pro level and don't give me that crude about Google guidelines. There are other apps out there that don't have that problem. They are censorship free and you're just lazy.
text_zh: 好吧，不太好，去掉你的审查制度，如果你什么都审查那就不算幻想了，我觉得我的钱该退回来了。这并不值得专业级别，别拿谷歌指南来说事。市面上还有其他没有这个问题的应用，它们是无审查的，你们只是懒惰。
reply_original: Hi there, we understand your frustration. Our content policies comply with Google Play guidelines to ensure a safe environment. If you'd like to discuss further, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. For refund requests, follow Google Play's official process. Thank you for your feedback!
reply_zh: 你好，我们理解你的挫败感。我们的内容政策符合Google Play指南，以确保一个安全的环境。如果您想进一步讨论，请通过support@fantachat.ai邮箱联系我们。对于退款请求，请遵循Google Play的官方流程。感谢您的反馈！
